revision.text: [[User:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}]] ([[User talk:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|talk]] '''·''' [[Special:Contributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|contribs]] '''·''' [https://supercount.toolforge.org/index.php?user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}&project=en.wikipedia count] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Log|user={{anchorencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} logs] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{anchorencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} block log] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Listusers|limit=1&username={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} lu] '''·''' {{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for adminship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for adminship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfas]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for adminship#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfa]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for bureaucratship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for bureaucratship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfb]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for bureaucratship#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfb]]}} '''·'''{{#if:{{{ban|}}}| [[{{SITENAME}}:List of banned users#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|ban]] '''·'''}} {{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for arbitration/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for arbitration/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|arb]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for arbitration#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|arb]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for comment/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for comment/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfc]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for comment/User conduct|rfc]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: {{SITENAME}}:Long-term abuse/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[{{SITENAME}}:Long-term abuse/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|lta]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Long-term abuse#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|lta]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: {{SITENAME}}:Sockpuppet investigations/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[{{SITENAME}}:Sockpuppet investigations/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|socks]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Sockpuppet investigations#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|socks]]}}{{#ifexist::Category:{{SITENAME}} sockpuppets of {{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[:Category:{{SITENAME}} sockpuppets of {{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}| confirmed]]}}{{#ifexist::Category:Suspected {{SITENAME}} sockpuppets of {{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[:Category:Suspected {{SITENAME}} sockpuppets of {{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|suspected]]}}) {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
